name: New IT show is crazy
description:
Spoilers but anyway

I just got done watching only the FIRST epidsode of welcome to Derry and OH MY GOD. There's like too much going on bro, from the car scene to the movie theater and the kids dying, never thought I'd be in such shock during such fiction, but the way that kid hit the wall was kinda funny. Anyway I WILL be doing a bot on them because of how intrigued I am in the show, def worth the hype and scare
creator: Blaxkknightt
